title: Pan-tumor validation of FoundationOne®CDx as a companion diagnostic for RET fusions as a predictor of response to selpercatinib.
abstract: RET fusions represent a subgroup of alterations in cancer biology that exhibit sensitivity to selective RET kinase inhibitors. We analytically validated a next-generation sequencing-based companion diagnostic (CDx) to detect RET fusions in solid tumors via a comprehensive genomic profiling assay, FoundationOne ® CDx (F1CDx ® ).
